name: truth_social_scraper
title: Truth Social Scraper
description: Retrieve public Truth Social profiles, indexed user posts, or one post through public search and Mastodon-compatible status data.

logo.label: Truth Social logo
logo.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 64 64"><rect width="64" height="64" rx="14" fill="#5448ee"/><path fill="#fff" d="M13 15h38v9H37v25H27V24H13z"/></svg>

seo.title: Truth Social Profile and Post Scraper API
seo.description: Scrape public Truth Social profiles, indexed timelines, and posts with author, engagement, and media data.
seo.intro: Truth Social Scraper combines Google-indexed public post discovery with the platform's Mastodon-compatible status surface. This supports prominent public profiles and visible timelines even when logged-out account APIs are blocked, while keeping the index-backed coverage limitation explicit.

useCases.title: Public-figure monitoring
useCases.description: Inspect public Truth Social posts without maintaining a browser session.

useCases.title: Profile and timeline research
useCases.description: Recover profile metadata and visible posts for prominent public accounts through indexed status URLs.

useCases.title: Post analysis
useCases.description: Turn one public post into clean text, author, engagement, and media fields.

useCases.title: Agent context
useCases.description: Give agents normalized public Truth Social data instead of raw HTML and platform-specific payloads.

faqs.question: Does this require a Truth Social login?
faqs.answer: No. It only reads a public post surface and does not use private cookies or credentials.

faqs.question: Can it fetch profile timelines?
faqs.answer: Yes, for accounts with publicly indexed status URLs. Coverage is best-effort because Google does not index every post.

faqs.question: Does it include media and engagement?
faqs.answer: Yes. Public post results include reply, retruth, like, and visible media fields when the platform returns them.

mode.description: Retrieve a profile, indexed user posts, or one public post.

handle.description: Truth Social handle or public profile URL for profile and posts modes.

user_id.description: Optional numeric account id for direct timeline lookup.

post_url.description: Public Truth Social post URL or numeric post id.

max_results.description: Maximum indexed user posts to enrich.

next_max_id.description: Optional direct timeline cursor when using user_id.

source_url.description: Public Truth Social API endpoint fetched

count.description: Number of profiles or posts returned

next_max_id.description: Cursor for the next page of posts

last_status_at.description: Date of most recent visible post

bot.description: Whether the account is marked as automated

sensitive.description: Whether the post is marked sensitive

post.description: One normalized public Truth Social post

sensitive.description: Whether the post is marked sensitive
